page.title: Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in YYYY category header

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in YYYY category header]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 378 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in YYYY category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Religious organizations established in YYYY"}} or {{nowrap|"Religious organizations disestablished in YYYY"}}, where YYYY is an 4-digit year (e.g. "1902"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Religious organizations (dis)established in YYYY category header/core|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in (%d%d%d%d)$|%2|1|false}}|action={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in (%d%d%d%d)$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in YYYY category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Religious organizations established in YYYY"}} or {{nowrap|"Religious organizations disestablished in YYYY"}}, where YYYY is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937)"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}} {{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in %d%d%d%d$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
